discussion_comments.comment_body: current iteration of my dockerfile cuda, everything listed has been optimized to be compatible for out of the box cuda setup without version conflicts presently. the playwrite is redudantly handled here because at times the dependencies were not properly installed so im handling it here for the time being.

the sanitize tags function at bottom was a way to ensure <think> </think> or thinking tags etc are able to be sanitized with one function loop per input line to prevent <think> from corrupting our json outputs.

the result is that models like deepseek or qwq will function and animate correctly in the UI because the <think> tag isnt present which caused json issues when it was.
